Content: Schafer: Oh, Brad is out. Okay.
Content_zh: Schafer：喔，Brad 不在。好。

Content: Hello everybody.
Content_zh: 大家好

Content: Hi. It's good to see you.
Content_zh: 嗨，很高興見到你。

Content: Hello. Thank you for coming.
Content_zh: 哈囉，謝謝你們來。

Content: So, uh, it's Monday, and Friday was terrible.
Content_zh: 今天是星期一，而上星期五真的很糟。

Content: Uh, all of you were here.
Content_zh: 呃，你們當時都在。

Content: I want to just think everyone for, uh, showing so much class
Content_zh: 我想謝謝大家，呃，那天表現得那麼有風度，

Content: going through that difficult day.
Content_zh: 一起度過那個艱難的日子。

Content: You guys all, um, uh, held together nicely.
Content_zh: 大家都，嗯，撐得很好。

Content: It was a rough day on everybody and, um, I think you showed a lot of compassion
Content_zh: 那天對每個人都很難熬，嗯，我覺得大家展現了很多同理心，

Content: for the people who are leaving and also understanding for those of us who had to make that decision,
Content_zh: 給那些要離開的人，也體諒我們這些不得不做出決定的人，

Content: and it really helped us get through it.
Content_zh: 這真的幫助我們撐了過來。

Content: And we will--we are getting through it, and it's, um...
Content_zh: 我們會…… 我們會熬過去的……

Content: Now we have a bunch of games we gotta make and stuff to do.
Content_zh: 現在我們還有一堆遊戲要做、一堆事情要忙。

Content: Um, we are still helping the people who need letters of reference,
Content_zh: 嗯，我們還在幫需要推薦信的人，

Content: letters of recommendation, stuff like that.
Content_zh: 像推薦信之類的。

Content: Help--doing what we can to get them set up with new engagements.
Content_zh: 盡我們所能幫他們找到新的工作機會。

Content: Um, but other than that, we here are still working on these games.
Content_zh: 嗯，但除此之外，留下來的我們還是要繼續做這些遊戲。

Content: Did you want to talk about the layoffs?
Content_zh: 你想談談裁員的事嗎？

Content: -Is that part of the documentary?
Content_zh: 那是紀錄片的一部分嗎？

Content: Talk about the layoffs. I'm gonna have a drink.
Content_zh: 說到裁員的事 我要喝一杯。

Content: Can I drink on camera?
Content_zh: 我能在攝影機上喝酒嗎？

Content: If the kids are watchin' this, kids, don't drink.
Content_zh: 如果孩子在看，孩子，不要喝酒。

Content: A week ago, we had a project canceled, an unannounced project from a publisher
Content_zh: 一週前，我們有個專案被取消，是一個發行商委託、尚未公開的專案，

Content: that really liked the game.
Content_zh: 而且他們其實很喜歡那款遊戲。

Content: We had just done our vertical slice and then gave us great feedback on it
Content_zh: 我們才剛做完 vertical slice，他們也給了很好的回饋，

Content: and they said it was great and they really liked it.
Content_zh: 他們說很棒，他們很喜歡

Content: And then the next call was they're canceling it for higher-up reasons.
Content_zh: 結果下一通電話就說，因為高層因素，他們要取消。

Content: Well, that was a big project that was funding a lot of people.
Content_zh: 那是個大專案，支撐著很多人的薪水。

Content: And--and then another one of our publishers from another project is having financial problems
Content_zh: 然後我們另一個專案的發行商也遇到財務問題，

Content: and can't pay us.
Content_zh: 也付不出錢給我們。

Content: Bailey: You know, it's public news now that Majesco is, um...
Content_zh: Bailey：Majesco 是……

Content: Pardon me.
Content_zh: 抱歉

Content: Not timed there.
Content_zh: 時間點真不巧。

Content: Majesco has made a public statement that
Content_zh: Majesco 公開宣佈：

Content: their, you know, continued ability to perform as--as a going concern is at stake and, of course,
Content_zh: 他們，你知道，能不能繼續營運都成了問題，當然，

Content: we did Costume Quest 2 with them and the payments were not complete for that.
Content_zh: 我們和他們一起做了《Costume Quest 2》，但款項還沒付清。

Content: So we're actually-- we're owed money by Majesco that we're not getting paid.
Content_zh: 所以其實 Majesco 欠我們錢，而我們現在拿不到。

Content: And then, of course Costume Quest 2, um, because of that statement, you can infer
Content_zh: 當然，《Costume Quest 2》也因為那份聲明，你可以推斷，

Content: that it's not being marketed properly and it's not being distributed to its fullest extent
Content_zh: 它沒有被好好行銷，也沒有得到應有的完整發行，

Content: that you would expect from a publisher, because there-- you know, the means and the people there to do that
Content_zh: 不像你會期待發行商做到的那樣，因為他們那邊，你知道，已經沒有資源和人手，

Content: just don't exist anymore.
Content_zh: 只是不再存在。

Content: Um, so it's kind of a perfect storm.
Content_zh: 嗯，所以有點像所有壞事同時發生。

Content: It was a bad week to put it mildly.
Content_zh: 保守地說，那是很糟的一週。

Content: So, glad that week's over.
Content_zh: 所以，很高興那一週過去了。

Content: If that publisher hadn't canceled it, you know, things would have been--
Content_zh: 如果那個發行商沒有取消，你知道，事情本來會……

Content: were looking really good for the studio.
Content_zh: 工作室的狀況本來看起來很不錯。

Content: Um, I think things are still looking really good for the studio,
Content_zh: 嗯，我覺得工作室現在其實仍然很有前景，

Content: but only because we took quick action.
Content_zh: 但是因為我們動作很快

Content: Schafer: So we had to let go of 12 people.
Content_zh: Schafer：所以我們不得不裁掉 12 個人。

Content: Some of them, uh, had been here for a short period of time and some of them had been here for a long period of time,
Content_zh: 有些人，呃，在這裡待的時間不長，有些人則待了很久，

Content: over ten years.
Content_zh: 超過十年。

Content: So that was really hard.
Content_zh: 所以那真的很難

Content: Stoddard: What do you want to know, how I feel about them and-- Off camera: Yeah, yeah, how was it? I mean you--
Content_zh: Stoddard：你想知道什麼？我對他們的感覺，還是…… 畫外音：對，對，感覺怎麼樣？我是說你……

Content: Stoddard: It was horrible. -Yeah.
Content_zh: Stoddard：太可怕了 -是的

Content: It was really horrible. Um...
Content_zh: 太可怕了 嗯……

Content: I mean, I understand why it happened, but, like, we--the audio team was super tight, uh,
Content_zh: 我是說，我明白為什麼會發生，但我們……音效團隊本來非常緊密，呃，

Content: and now there's two of us instead of four.
Content_zh: 現在只有我們兩個而不是四個人

Content: Um, it was a heavy hit.
Content_zh: 嗯，這是一個沉重的打擊。

Content: The day of the layoffs were just brutal.
Content_zh: 裁員那天真的很殘酷。

Content: Kipnis: Uh, well, I will say that the layoffs-- I wasn't actually at the office when it happened, so...
Content_zh: Kipnis：呃，好吧，我會說裁員…… 我其實不是在辦公室，所以……

Content: And, um, at first, like, I--I got-- I got text messages about it
Content_zh: 起初我收到簡訊

Content: and it was, uh...
Content_zh: 而且……

Content: it was really tough to--to hear about it, um, and it--it was tough to, like, not be here to say goodbye
Content_zh: 聽到這件事真的很難受，嗯，而且不能在這裡跟他們道別也很難受，

Content: to some of those people that I've worked with for years and years
Content_zh: 對我多年工作的人

Content: and, like, you know, I'm gonna miss a lot.
Content_zh: 而且，你知道，我會很想念很多人。

Content: I don't know what else to say.
Content_zh: 我不知道還能說什麼

Content: Crook: And you always feel a little bit guilty when you're still here, you know, and other people aren't,
Content_zh: Crook：當你還留在這裡，而其他人不在了，總會有一點罪惡感，

Content: um, and it hurts morale quite a bit, um, but...
Content_zh: 嗯，士氣確實受到很大打擊，嗯，不過……

Content: but I know that it--I know that it was not taken lightly.
Content_zh: 但我知道……我知道這不是草率做出的決定。

Content: Hansen: It was the hardest day of my life.
Content_zh: Hansen：那是我一生中最難熬的一天

Content: I never thought we would be in that situation, but project cancelations happen and, you know,
Content_zh: 我從沒想過我們會這樣 但專案取消會發生

Content: sometimes you can absorb it and sometimes you can't.
Content_zh: 有時候你能消化這種衝擊，有時候不行。

Content: So Tim and I almost avoided each other just 'cause we knew that we had to meet and talk about that.
Content_zh: 所以 Tim 和我差點迴避彼此 因為我們知道我們得見面談這件事

Content: And I didn't want to, and he didn't want to either.
Content_zh: 我也不想 他也不想

Content: There was no, like, oh, yeah, it's so easy, it's person X, Y, and Z.
Content_zh: 不是那種「喔，對，很簡單，就是 X、Y、Z 這幾個人」的狀況。

Content: It's like every single one of those people are-- they're huge contributors to all these games we've made.
Content_zh: 就像那些人中的每個人 他們對我們做過的這些遊戲都貢獻很大

Content: They're the people we hang out with after work and so-- And, you know, and it's tough for Double Fine in general,
Content_zh: 他們是下班後會一起混的人，所以……而且，你知道，這對 Double Fine 整體來說也很難，

Content: because historically, I mean, we even said this in the media in the past,
Content_zh: 因為歷史上 我們過去在媒體上說過

Content: we don't do layoffs and that sort of thing.
Content_zh: 我們不裁員，不做那種事。

Content: It was--it was a tough decision for sure.
Content_zh: 這…… 這是個很難的決定

Content: Russell: A lot of us just stayed afterwards in the room, after we were told, and just talked about
Content_zh: Russell：之後我們很多人都待在房間裏 聽說了之後

Content: the history of the company, and just, we were like, we couldn't believe this happened to us,
Content_zh: 公司的歷史，然後我們都覺得，真的不敢相信這件事會發生在我們身上，

Content: but you know, in the game industry and in any entertainment industry,
Content_zh: 但你知道，在遊戲業，或任何娛樂產業裡，

Content: it's--it's the norm.
Content_zh: 這……這就是常態。

Content: We're the exception, so in that respect I-- I--I feel lucky,
Content_zh: 我們是例外，所以我覺得很幸運

Content: and we'll survive, a little bit smaller, a little leaner, but we'll make it.
Content_zh: 我們會撐下去，只是規模小一點、精簡一點，但我們會做到。

Content: [Music] Schafer: So basically we are powering forward on our, um,
Content_zh: [音樂] Schafer：所以基本上，我們正在全力推進，嗯，

Content: uh, remaining titles that we're working on.
Content_zh: 呃，我們手上剩下正在做的作品。

Content: Those are the stories I really wanted to make the documentary about
Content_zh: 那些才是我真正想讓紀錄片拍下來的故事，

Content: but we could never do that, like, those publisher games,
Content_zh: 但我們以前永遠不能拍，像那些發行商專案，

Content: to see, like, what it's like, all those meetings where they're saying,
Content_zh: 看看那到底是什麼樣子，像那些會議裡他們說，

Content: "This game is so great, we can't wait to see it." And then the meeting where they actually said it's canceled,
Content_zh: 「這遊戲太棒了，我們等不及想看到。」然後下一場會議他們卻真的說取消，

Content: we have to cancel it, but I hope you still make it 'cause I really want to play it.
Content_zh: 我們得取消它，但我希望你們還是做出來，因為我真的很想玩。

Content: That was an actual quote from the guy, he was like, "If you make it
Content_zh: 那真的是那個人的原話，他說：「如果你們做出來，

Content: I really want to play it." It's like, "Oh, thanks, that makes up
Content_zh: 我真的很想玩。」感覺就像：「喔，謝了，這樣就彌補了，

Content: for me laying off 12 people.
Content_zh: 我裁掉 12 個人的事。」

Content: That--I totally feel good now that you want to play this game
Content_zh: 「你想玩這款遊戲，這樣……我現在完全好受多了，

Content: that you just killed." But, um, since I'm mostly fueled by angriness and bitterness,
Content_zh: 這款被你親手殺掉的遊戲。」不過，嗯，既然我主要是靠憤怒和怨念驅動，

Content: then I'm stronger than ever right now.
Content_zh: 那我現在比以往更強。

Content: You know, whatever works.
Content_zh: 你知道，有用就好。

Content: [Music] [Chatter]
Content_zh: [音樂] [交談聲]

Content: Schafer: Oh god, is that thing still here? Mitchell: It's way funnier now.
Content_zh: Schafer：天啊，那東西還在嗎？ 現在有趣多了

Content: Muir: It was just sad. Mitchell: Yeah.
Content_zh: Muir：只是很悲傷 是的

Content: Muir: It wasn't bad. Mitchell: No.
Content_zh: Muir：不錯 不

Content: Schafer: That one that you found under the sink?
Content_zh: Schafer：你在水槽下面找到的那個？

Content: Muir: It's really good. It's like, uh...
Content_zh: Muir：真的很棒，就像……

Content: Mitchell: It's gooey, though.
Content_zh: Mitchell：雖然很不錯

Content: Muir: Chipotle.
Content_zh: Muir：奇波特爾

Content: Schafer: Is everyone here?
Content_zh: Schafer：大家都在嗎？

Content: [Murmuring] Hello, everybody! Hello.
Content_zh: 大家好！ 你好

Content: And thank you for coming back to work here again for another year.
Content_zh: 感謝你再回來工作一年

Content: It's awesome to see you all here.
Content_zh: 很高興見到你們

Content: Welcome back.
Content_zh: 歡迎回來

Content: Nice to see you all.
Content_zh: 很高興見到你們

Content: Rice: Yeah, man.
Content_zh: Rice：是啊，老兄。

Content: Schafer: 2015. Wait a second.
Content_zh: Schafer：2015 年。等一下

Content: Does that mean we didn't finish in December?
Content_zh: 那意味著我們十二月沒結束嗎？

Content: Rice: Yeah.
Content_zh: Rice：是啊。

Content: Comin' on three years.
Content_zh: 3 年了

Content: Schafer: Three--no kidding? It's like Rip Van Winkle.
Content_zh: Schafer：三年……真的假的？簡直像 Rip Van Winkle。

Content: All I remember is the Kickstarter, and then I woke up and it's three years later.
Content_zh: 我只記得 Kickstarter，然後一醒來就已經三年後了。

Content: Crook: And we all have big, long--and we all have big, long beards.
Content_zh: Crook：我們都有大長鬍子

Content: Schafer: Yeah, we're just here with beards.
Content_zh: Schafer：是啊，我們只是在這裡有鬍子。

Content: Ray, where did all that money go, what?
Content_zh: Ray，那些錢都跑去哪了，蛤？

Content: I guess we should ship this game.
Content_zh: 我想我們該把這遊戲推出去了。

Content: But the game was awesome.
Content_zh: 但這遊戲很棒

Content: Um, but, um, but we-- I think I'm trying to this week still keep play testing,
Content_zh: 嗯，但是，嗯，但我們…… 我想這周我還在試試

Content: especially the problem areas in the game where people get hung up the most
Content_zh: 尤其是遊戲裡玩家最容易卡住的問題區域，

Content: and catch any remaining dialogue.
Content_zh: 也抓出任何還缺的台詞。

Content: There's probably some object interactions or examine lines that are still missing that I would love to catch.
Content_zh: 可能還有一些物件互動或查看台詞漏掉了，我很想把它們抓出來。

Content: Please keep talking and don't be freaked out that we're not answering you, 'cause we'd just like
Content_zh: 請繼續說，不要被嚇壞 我們不回答你，因為我們只是想

Content: to hear what you're thinking.
Content_zh: 聽到你在想什麼

Content: Miller: All right.
Content_zh: Miller：好吧

Content: I'm already baffled.
Content_zh: 我已經很困惑了

Content: Vella: Is this one?
Content_zh: Vella：是這個嗎？

Content: Miller: This must be incredibly fun to watch.
Content_zh: Miller：這一定很好玩

Content: Schafer: We're not even here.
Content_zh: Schafer：我們甚至不在這裡。

Content: Miller: What's that? You're not paying attention?
Content_zh: Miller：那是什麼？ 你不注意？

Content: Schafer: Yeah, I'm doing my taxes over here.
Content_zh: Schafer：是的，我在這裡做我的稅。

Content: Miller: I think I'll switch to Shay 'cause I can't figure this out.
Content_zh: Miller：我想我該轉告 Shay 了 因為我搞不懂

Content: Schafer: I mean, it's--it--that-- the first puzzle, it's, like, one of the first puzzles that Vella has,
Content_zh: Schafer：我的意思是，它是 - 它 - - - - 那是 - 第一個謎題，它就像，一個最早的謎題 Vella 有，

Content: and you have to do something and get this visual feedback, and you have to mess with it a lot and get some more feedback
Content_zh: 你必須做一些事情 得到這些視覺回饋 並且你必須處理很多事情 得到更多的回饋

Content: to kind of figure out the patterns.
Content_zh: 找出模式

Content: Um, and then it's just a problem of, like, have we kind of inceptioned? Is that a verb?
Content_zh: 嗯，然後它只是一個問題，像，我們有種創始？ 那是動詞嗎？

Content: Put the idea in the player's head of what they want to do enough.
Content_zh: 有沒有把玩家該做什麼的想法，充分種進他們腦中。

Content: 'Cause sometimes you just mess with the game and you just kind of bang on it
Content_zh: 因為有時候你只會玩遊戲 而你卻只會搞砸

Content: and you--woo, you solved it, you don't really know how you solved it.
Content_zh: 你…… 你解決了，你不知道你是如何解決的

Content: And that to me is almost a worst-case scenario.
Content_zh: 這對我來說幾乎是最糟糕的情況

Content: That's almost worse than getting stuck forever, you know?
Content_zh: 這比永遠被困住更糟糕

Content: Like, getting-- 'cause being stuck forever, if you finally solve it you feel great.
Content_zh: 像是…… 因為永遠被困住了 如果你終於解決了 你感覺很好

Content: But if you solve it in accident, you're like, I don't know what just happened, you move on
Content_zh: 但如果你是意外解開的，就會覺得「我剛剛根本不知道發生什麼」，然後繼續往前，

Content: and you kind of get this kind of bored feeling.
Content_zh: 你感覺有點無聊

Content: And it's really easy to just accidently put this one line in
Content_zh: 意外地放這條線很簡單

Content: that makes everybody just know what to do immediately.
Content_zh: 這讓所有人都知道該怎麼做

Content: So it's--it's like a lot of-- 'cause time--time is short and we don't have much-- we don't have much time left,
Content_zh: 所以…… 這就像很多…… 因為時間很短 我們沒多少時間了……

Content: and to solve these problems, to make sure that everyone gets through the game,
Content_zh: 為瞭解決這些問題 為了讓大家通過比賽

Content: it's really tempting to just kind of, like, short circuit all the puzzles and make sure
Content_zh: 真的很容易會想乾脆把所有謎題都簡化掉，確保

Content: that everybody can get through them.
Content_zh: 大家都能熬過去

Content: But you have to kind of take a lot of time to actually really look, um, carefully at, like,
Content_zh: 但你得花很多時間 才能真正地，嗯，小心地看

Content: each mental leap the player is making.
Content_zh: 玩家每一步推理上的跳躍。

Content: [Off camera] If people were saying the first one was too easy and you're taking out a lot of the hints,
Content_zh: [畫外音] 如果有人說第一個太容易了 而你卻在暗示

Content: I mean, are you afraid you went too far in the other direction?
Content_zh: 你怕你走得太遠了嗎？

Content: -It seems like there's a lot-- Schafer: Well, I'm hoping-- I'm hoping we went way too far.
Content_zh: -好像有很多…… 我希望……

Content: Rice: But yeah, like Tim said, in general I think we're gonna keep play testing
Content_zh: Rice：但就像 Tim 說的 總的來說 我覺得我們會繼續做測試

Content: in hopes that anything that we find that is a problem
Content_zh: 希望我們發現的都是問題

Content: down the road could be changed.
Content_zh: 沿著路可以改變

Content: Crook: Are we gonna have-- with--with Ben leaving, are we having any other-- another GP coming on
Content_zh: Crook：我們是不是要…… 和…… Ben 一起走 有沒有別的……

Content: or are we gonna be able to just absorb?
Content_zh: 還是我們能吸收？

Content: Peck: Um, well, it's my second to last day here at Double Fine.
Content_zh: Peck：嗯，好吧，這是我的第二 至最後一天在這裡的 Double Fine。

Content: And, uh, just trying to, like, put a bow on as many things as I could before leaving.
Content_zh: 呃，就是想在離開前，盡量把能收尾的事情都收好。

Content: The place I'm going to is quite a bit-- it's like a larger company so...
Content_zh: 我要去的地方有點…… 就像個更大的公司

Content: I'm--yeah, I'm gonna miss the...
Content_zh: 是的，我會想念……

Content: Crook: I mean, we're gonna be pushing to the very end.
Content_zh: Crook：我的意思是，我們要推到最後。

Content: [Off screen] Like that guy there. Crook: Oh yeah he is.
Content_zh: [畫外音] 就像那傢伙 哦，是的，他是。

Content: I think he didn't go home last night.
Content_zh: 我想他昨晚沒回家

Content: But apparently he has, like, a little bed over there.
Content_zh: 但顯然他那邊有張小牀

Content: So I'm just like, that's not a good thing.
Content_zh: 所以我就想，那不是件好事

Content: Stoddard: I don't want to romanticize it.
Content_zh: Stoddard：我不想浪漫化

Content: I know--I know that Tim wants to show how the sausage gets made,
Content_zh: 我知道 我知道 Tim 想看看香腸是怎麼做的

Content: and this has been-- this has been hard.
Content_zh: 而這一直…… 這一直很難。

Content: Schafer: We're also getting kind of griefed by, um, certain fringe organizations
Content_zh: Schafer：我們也感到悲傷 某些邊緣組織

Content: and attack groups organized, and, uh, that was a bummer.
Content_zh: 和攻擊團體組織，和，呃，那是個不幸的。

Content: And then we had the layoffs which were a huge bummer.
Content_zh: 然後我們就被裁員了 是個很無聊的人

Content: And, um, a bunch of bad news.
Content_zh: 還有一堆壞消息

Content: Rice: There is, like, a group of people that are hoping that we won't succeed for some weird reason,
Content_zh: Rice：有一羣人希望我們不會成功

Content: um, or that are at least heavily scrutinizing us.
Content_zh: 嗯，或者這至少是 重視我們。

Content: And it definitely has been something that's been weighing on a lot of people.
Content_zh: 而這肯定是 一直在重壓很多人。

Content: Franzke: The endless thing of, like, people, like, oh, well, maybe they shouldn't have taken the--the money
Content_zh: Franzke：人們的無盡之處 也許他們不該拿走錢

Content: and only make half the game. Well, you know, all I can say to that is, like,
Content_zh: 而且只做一半的遊戲。 我只能說……

Content: if you would be, like, we're sitting here, you know, working our asses off to make this game.
Content_zh: 如果你是，像，我們坐在這裡，你知道，工作 我們的屁股做這遊戲。

Content: Kipnis: And, like, you do, you question yourself.
Content_zh: Kipnis：你自問自問

Content: Like, yeah, maybe we-- what the fuck, maybe we don't know what the--what we're doing.
Content_zh: 像，是的，也許我們…… 他媽的，也許我們不知道 我們在做什麼……

Content: Who knows?
Content_zh: 誰知道呢？

Content: But you just have to trust and know, like, this is actually-- game development
Content_zh: 但你只需要信任和知道，就像，這實際上是……

Content: is not an easy thing.
Content_zh: 不是一件容易的事。

Content: Schafer: And now we're gonna ship Broken Age, and that's all gonna be great.
Content_zh: Schafer：現在我們要推出《Broken Age》，一切都會很棒。

Content: So, um, it's a relief to get out of that-- out of that period.
Content_zh: 所以，嗯，這是一個解脫 走出那段時間……

Content: [Offscreen] What's going on right now at this stage of the project?
Content_zh: [畫外音] 專案這一階段發生了什麼事？

Content: Romero: So where we are is, we're less than a month out from our first submission,
Content_zh: Romero：所以就我們現在的位置 距我們第一次提交文件不到一個月

Content: which is the, um, where you submit to Sony and we release the mastering for the PC,
Content_zh: 也就是，嗯，要送交 Sony 認證，並釋出 PC 實體版的母片，

Content: physical copies that we're doing with Nordic.
Content_zh: 也就是我們和 Nordic 合作的實體版。

Content: So the 20th is the big day where just everything has to sort of be done by that point.
Content_zh: 所以第 20 天是大日子 在那之前一切都得完成

Content: Rice: Uh, yes, I've been working on some Nordic stuff, too, along with Vic. Um... We got the box prints
Content_zh: Rice：嗯，對，我也和 Vic 一起處理一些 Nordic 的事。嗯……我們拿到了盒裝印樣，

Content: from them and they just look a little bit dark so we're doing, like, another round on those
Content_zh: 它們看起來有點黑 所以我們在做另一輪

Content: before they actually start printing them in bulk.
Content_zh: 在他們開始大量列印之前

Content: Uh, but hopefully that'll happen soon.
Content_zh: 但希望這會很快發生

Content: Schafer: But we don't get a sample before they make a zillion of them?
Content_zh: Schafer：但是在他們做一萬塊之前 我們沒拿到樣本嗎？

Content: Rice: No, unfortunately. Schafer: Exciting.
Content_zh: Rice：不 很不幸 薛弗：令人振奮。

Content: Rice: Yeah. Schafer: That's exciting.
Content_zh: Rice：是啊。 真刺激

Content: This is just one of Cory's mock-ups of the box.
Content_zh: 這只是 Cory 的盒子模型之一

Content: This is the box.
Content_zh: 這是盒子。

Content: This is--the disc's not gonna look like that.
Content_zh: 這碟子不會那樣的

Content: I wanted the disc to be the O from Broken Age.
Content_zh: 我想讓光碟變成《Broken Age》裡那個 O。

Content: This is gonna be like the O, and that's the box.
Content_zh: 這會像那個 O，而那就是盒子。

Content: And we're first looking at it, we're like, this is cool 'cause it shows the split thing,
Content_zh: 我們一開始看到時覺得很酷，因為它呈現了分裂的概念，

Content: but it really overemphasizes Vella over Shay, 'cause Shay's upside down so he's, like, easier to ignore.
Content_zh: 但它真的太強調 Vella、弱化 Shay 了，因為 Shay 是倒過來的，所以比較容易被忽略。

Content: It was like, wouldn't it be crazy if we could print Vella and Shay
Content_zh: 我們就在想，如果能把 Vella 和 Shay 印在，

Content: on a separate clear slipcover, and then you could slide it off
Content_zh: 另一個透明書套上，然後你可以把它抽出來，

Content: and turn it around and slide it back down and then Shay would be in Vella's world and vice versa,
Content_zh: 轉個方向再套回去，這樣 Shay 就會在 Vella 的世界裡，反之亦然，

Content: Which, no spoilers, but that's some foreshadowing there.
Content_zh: 這不是劇透，但那其實有一點伏筆。

Content: And it would be so neat.
Content_zh: 那樣就太完美了

Content: It would be like Led Zeppelin.
Content_zh: 就會像 Led Zeppelin 那樣。

Content: Rice: We'll nail it. It'll be great.
Content_zh: Rice：我們會搞定的 會很棒的

Content: -Um... Kipnis: Wow.
Content_zh: 哇

Content: Romero: So right now the big tasks are-- or the big areas are bugs.
Content_zh: Romero：所以現在最大的任務……或者最大的領域，就是 bug。

Content: O'Rourke: Yeah, we're in Starship Troopers mode basically, just killing all the bugs.
Content_zh: O'Rourke：對，我們基本上進入《Starship Troopers》模式，一直殺 bug。

Content: Schafer: Taking showers together or what are you-- Coull: No. Schafer: I'm sorry, that's...
Content_zh: Schafer：一起洗澡還是什麼嗎？ Coull：不是。 Schafer：抱歉，那是……

Content: not the first thing I think about.
Content_zh: 不是我想的第一件事

Content: O'Rouke: There's the daily shower scene in the audio room.
Content_zh: O'Rouke：音效室每天都有淋浴戲。

Content: Kipnis: I'm a little bit concerned about our deadline.
Content_zh: Kipnis：我有點擔心我們的最後期限

Content: Like, right here it says A and B bugs only.
Content_zh: 這裏只寫著 A 和 B bug

Content: Like, that's not likely gonna happen, especially since we have brand new cut scenes.
Content_zh: 特別是因為我們有新的過場動畫

Content: Schafer: Starting now or next week?
Content_zh: Schafer：從現在或下週開始？

Content: Kipnis: Next week.
Content_zh: Kipnis：下週

Content: Uh, that's likely not happening because we have a bunch of new, um, cut scenes coming.
Content_zh: 呃，那大概不會發生，因為我們還有一堆新的，嗯，過場動畫要進來。

Content: Content is still coming in and we can't actually do that until all content is in the game.
Content_zh: 內容還在進來，而所有內容放進遊戲之前，我們其實沒辦法做到那件事。

Content: Schafer: What's this selective bug fixing?
Content_zh: Schafer：這個有選擇的 bug 在修什麼？

Content: Almost sounds more open-ended than A and B 'cause we select to do a C.
Content_zh: 聽起來比 A 和 B 更開放 因為我們選擇做 C

Content: Right, that's how that works?
Content_zh: 就是這樣的嗎？

Content: Kipnis: Nope. Rice: I don't think so.
Content_zh: Kipnis：不。 Rice：我不覺得。

Content: Kipnis: But if you play the game all the way through, um, from Act 1,
Content_zh: Kipnis：但是如果你一直玩遊戲 從第一幕開始

Content: that Act 1 is very clean, and we have to make Act 2 look that clean,
Content_zh: 第一幕很乾淨 我們得讓第二幕看起來乾淨

Content: and that's a lot of C-bug fixing.
Content_zh: 這可是很多 C bug 的修復。

Content: And so, like, we can't suddenly switch to A and Bs only next week.
Content_zh: 所以，我們不能下週突然切成只修 A 和 B。

Content: Like, it's just not-- it's gonna be basically like a, I don't know,
Content_zh: 那樣就是……基本上會變成，我不知道，

Content: not a very clean game, I guess.
Content_zh: 我猜這遊戲不是很乾淨

Content: Romero: Uh, Act 2 is interesting because we're not just doing PC, Mac, and Linux digital,
Content_zh: Romero：呃，第二幕很有趣 因為我們不只是做 PC，Mac，和 Linux 數位，

Content: um, we're doing physical, when--and really that goes back to the old school way,
Content_zh: 嗯，我們也做實體版，而那其實回到了老派做法，

Content: which is you get to the point in the project where you're gonna ship a physical disc,
Content_zh: 也就是專案走到要推出實體光碟的階段，

Content: you have to cut off bug fixing.
Content_zh: 你就必須停止修 bug。

Content: You have to be certain that the build you're shipping is the one,
Content_zh: 你必須確定你要出貨的 build 就是最終版，

Content: because someone's gonna, in theory, buy the box and get the game,
Content_zh: 因為在理論上，有人會買下盒子 得到遊戲，

Content: and that has to have all the, you know, be bug-free as-- as bug-free as possible and as solid as possible,
Content_zh: 而它必須，你知道，盡可能沒有 bug、盡可能穩定，

Content: so they'll just have the disc and the game that's on there.
Content_zh: 因為他們手上就只有那張光碟和裡面的遊戲。

Content: That's it.
Content_zh: 好了

Content: Kipnis: I don't have confidence at the moment that we have--we're really
Content_zh: Kipnis：我現在沒有信心覺得我們真的……

Content: at the bug count that we are.
Content_zh: 真的只有目前看到的 bug 數量。

Content: Or, like, I--I expect that the bugs will increase tremendously,
Content_zh: 或者，像，我，我期望 bug 會大增，

Content: or should, because I think they are in there.
Content_zh: 或者說應該會增加，因為我覺得 bug 就在裡面。

Content: Romero: They're still there. Kipnis: Yeah.
Content_zh: Romero：他們還在 是的。

Content: Franzke: It's still gonna be good, like, I mean, this game has been out for such a long time, I think
Content_zh: Franzke：它還是會很好的，我是說，這款遊戲已經開發這麼久了，我覺得，

Content: it's gonna be stable and it's gonna be good, but there's always, like,
Content_zh: 它會很穩定，而且會很好，但總有，像，

Content: so much more that we would have liked to do and, like, we're now at a point where
Content_zh: 我們本想做的更多 現在我們正處於

Content: that's just not gonna be possible.
Content_zh: 那是不可能的

Content: We need to, you know, make sure that the game is stable.
Content_zh: 我們必須，你知道，確保遊戲穩定。

Content: You know, you look-- you look at your bug database and you list some issues that you have in there
Content_zh: 你知道，你看…… 你看看你的 bug 資料庫 列出一些你在裏面的問題

Content: and it's, like, a lot, and it's like, how are we gonna be able to--to finish that?
Content_zh: 我們怎麼能完成這個？

Content: We'll have to probably do some bug triaging next week to just see kind of, okay, well, all of these issues
Content_zh: 我們下週大概得做一些 bug triage，看看，好，這些問題裡，

Content: that are in the bug database right now, which one are we realistically gonna be able to even do now?
Content_zh: 目前 bug 資料庫裡的哪些，是我們現在實際上還做得到的？

Content: And then they have to-- there will have to be some hard decisions.
Content_zh: 然後他們不得不…… 不得不做出一些難於決定

Content: It's like, okay, well, we can only do one or the other, so which one of these issues,
Content_zh: 就像，好吧，我們只能做一個或另一個，所以其中一個問題，

Content: polish items is more important to you?
Content_zh: 或打磨項目，哪一個對你比較重要？

Content: And then we're gonna do that but not the other.
Content_zh: 然後我們會這樣做 但另一個不會

Content: And it's just the nature of the beast.
Content_zh: 這就是現實。

Content: [Music] Hansen: Resources in 12. Schafer: That would be great.
Content_zh: [音樂] (音樂) 漢森：資源在 12。 那太好了

Content: Uh, and yeah, we'll have to re-- and I mean, obviously,
Content_zh: 嗯，是的，我們得重新…… 我的意思是，顯然，

Content: analyze the bugs every day and how they're tracking.
Content_zh: 每天分析 bug 以及它們如何追蹤

Content: Are all the GPs back from sickness?
Content_zh: 所有 GP 都病好了嗎？

Content: Hansen: No, Anna's still out. Stoddard: Two down.
Content_zh: Hansen：沒有，Anna 還沒回來。 Stoddard：倒了兩個。

Content: Hansen: But-- Schafer: She's gonna be out today, too?
Content_zh: Hansen：她今天也要出去？

Content: Hansen: She's trying to get some medicine that'll allow her to work this week,
Content_zh: Hansen：她想得到一些藥物 讓她能在這周工作

Content: so she's that bad.
Content_zh: 所以她病得很嚴重。

Content: Schafer: Holy cow.
Content_zh: Schafer：天啊

Content: Crook: She was working really late hours.
Content_zh: Crook：她工作很晚

Content: I think she was probably-- Her immune system was already
Content_zh: 我想她可能…… 她的免疫系統已經

Content: pretty vulnerable, and, um, and she--she got whatever, I don't know.
Content_zh: 很脆弱，而且，嗯，她…… 她得到了什麼，我不知道。

Content: I hope--I don't know, she hasn't said.
Content_zh: 我希望…… 我不知道 她沒說

Content: She went to the doctor.
Content_zh: 她去看醫生了

Content: Hopefully it's not pneumonia or something, but, um,
Content_zh: 希望不是肺炎什麼的，但是，嗯，

Content: hopefully she'll be back with us on Monday.
Content_zh: 希望她星期一能跟我們一起回來

Content: But--but we know that the most important thing for her is just to get better.
Content_zh: 但是我們知道對她來說最重要的就是好起來

Content: You know, it's just a video game.
Content_zh: 你知道，這只是一個電玩。

Content: You know, she's, you know, her health is the most important thing,
Content_zh: 她的健康是最重要的

Content: so, um, so that's why it's been great.
Content_zh: 所以，嗯，所以它一直很好。

Content: Everyone has just jumped in to try and help out, and nobody blames anybody for anything.
Content_zh: 大家都跳進來幫忙，也沒有人怪任何人。

Content: -It's just one of those things. Boehle: I'll probably just filter, like, Anna's open or new bugs, like, priority two and higher,
Content_zh: -這就是會發生的事。 Boehle：我大概會先篩 Anna 開著或新開的 bug，像優先級二以上的，

Content: and then if there's anything UI related, I'll just grab those and--
Content_zh: 如果有 UI 相關的，我就把那些接過來……

Content: Franzke: Right. Yeah, I think we have to.
Content_zh: Franzke：好吧 是的，我想我們必須。

Content: I mean, it's just kind of-- sounds like Anna's hit pretty hard.
Content_zh: 我是說，聽起來 Anna 真的病得很重。

Content: Hansen: But it's still difficult because, you know, there's a lot of ownership over the code,
Content_zh: Hansen：但這還是很困難，因為你知道，很多程式碼都有各自的負責人，

Content: so Anna will be able to get something done a lot faster than anybody else just 'cause she's so familiar
Content_zh: 所以 Anna 能比別人快很多 因為她很熟悉

Content: with all the inner workings of how this stuff is all hooked up.
Content_zh: 很熟這些東西內部到底是怎麼接起來的。

Content: That makes it more difficult, for sure, 'cause all the pressure's on her right now.
Content_zh: 這肯定更難受 因為她現在壓力很大

Content: Rice: I guess at least through the week and then, I just--I guess I wonder when we're gonna get
Content_zh: Rice：我想至少這周，然後，我…… 我想我們什麼時候會得到……

Content: to other platform work, but for now it's obvious.
Content_zh: 但現在很明顯

Content: It seems like this is until we're locking stuff down.
Content_zh: 似乎要等到我們把東西鎖起來

Content: Franzke: I mean, like, whenever there's an actual pre-cert issue coming in from Sony,
Content_zh: Franzke：我的意思是，像，當有 實際的預驗證問題 從 Sony 進來，

Content: I'm jumping on it right away because I want to get them,
Content_zh: 我馬上跳上去 因為我想得到他們

Content: like, fixed as soon as possible.
Content_zh: 盡快修好

Content: But so far it's been pretty good.
Content_zh: 但目前還不錯

Content: I think actually not that many bugs been reported from pre-certs.
Content_zh: 其實我覺得預認證那邊回報的 bug 沒有很多。

Content: Rice: So, yeah, whathaveibeenworkingon? We have a couple things.
Content_zh: Rice：所以，對，我最近在做什麼？有幾件事。

Content: Today we set up a bug triage meeting with all of the leads.
Content_zh: 今天我們安排了一場和所有組長的 bug triage 會議。

Content: So, um, producers and leads and Tim, are gonna kind of read through everything in the bug database,
Content_zh: 所以，嗯，製作人、組長和 Tim 會一起把 bug 資料庫裡的東西看過一遍，

Content: reevaluating where we are with that.
Content_zh: 重新評估我們現在的處境

Content: So that'll be happening this afternoon.
Content_zh: 今天下午就這樣了

Content: Schafer: Hey, everybody, hello. Rice: Hi.
Content_zh: Schafer：大家好 Rice：嗨。

Content: Schafer: This is probably the last meeting of the project, right?
Content_zh: Schafer：這可能是專案的最後一次會議，對吧？

Content: Rice: Um... Probably not.
Content_zh: Rice：嗯…… 可能不是

Content: Schafer: We're so close. Rice: Big one, though.
Content_zh: Schafer：我們很接近了 Rice：雖大。

Content: Rice: It's a big one. Franzke: Apart from the meeting where we get all the royalty checks?
Content_zh: Rice：這場很重要。 Franzke：除了我們領權利金支票的那場會議以外？

Content: Schafer: Yeah, that's after. That's after.
Content_zh: Schafer：對，那在後面。那在後面。

Content: We have to ship it first, Oliver.
Content_zh: 我們得先把它推出去，Oliver。

Content: But yeah, so we're gonna look over the bug database and see if we can get rid of some bugs.
Content_zh: 但是我們要看看 bug 的資料庫 看看能不能除掉一些 bug

Content: Rice: I think the hope is really just trying to get an idea of which ones we definitely need to fix
Content_zh: Rice：我想希望是想瞭解我們需要修的

Content: and which ones might be okay to drop.
Content_zh: 哪些也許可以放掉。

Content: And this is specifically for the date in two weeks from now, which is like pressing it to the disc for PC.
Content_zh: 這特別是針對兩週後那個日期，也就是要把 PC 版壓成光碟。

Content: So I guess it's, like, what are we gonna not feel comfortable having fixed before that disc is pressed.
Content_zh: 所以我想問題是，哪些東西如果在壓片前沒修好，我們會覺得不能接受。

Content: And how bad is the situation right now?
Content_zh: 現在情況有多糟？

Content: 'Cause I'm hearing things like the bugs aren't gonna be fixed
Content_zh: 因為我聽到有人說 bug 會來不及修完，

Content: by the ship date and all that.
Content_zh: 趕不上發行日之類的。

Content: I mean, from Vic's last email, it sounds like we're tracking about half the speed
Content_zh: 從 Vic 的最後一封電子郵件 聽起來我們在追蹤一半的速度

Content: um, that we would need to be for fixing these 250.
Content_zh: 嗯，我們需要 修復這 250。

Content: Um, I guess it's just, like, what's the line we can draw where we're comfortable that it's a solid build
Content_zh: 嗯，我想就是要劃一條線，讓我們能放心說這是穩定的 build，

Content: that's not gonna crash that gives a good experience.
Content_zh: 不會當機，而且能提供好的體驗。

Content: And, yeah, maybe there's, like, some polish stuff that would have been nice to be in there
Content_zh: 而且，對，也許有些打磨項目如果能放進去會很好，

Content: but at least it's in versions that get patched.
Content_zh: 但至少那些是在會更新的版本裡。

Content: Hansen: I mean, every game that ships ships with bugs, period.
